title: Build, flash, and smoke-test R1 firmware on hardware
description: Why this exists: firmware is not complete until the actual device boots and proves the board path. What needs to be done: document flashing path, build firmware for the exact R1 target, flash the device, capture boot logs, and verify board identity, LICHEN_L2 enabled, LoRa configured, BLE advertising, and no fatal init failures. Acceptance criteria: reproducible build and flash commands exist; hardware boot logs are recorded in Beads notes; failures create blocker Beads with exact logs; three independent codereview subagents run after code changes and findings are recorded.
notes:
Blocked on physical hardware access after local detection pass.

Build state available from project-LICHEN-ev5b.4:
- EC2 Zephyr builder command is known-good for the image to flash: west build -p always -b r1_neo/nrf52840 -d build/gateway-r1-neo lichen/apps/gateway.
- Final build passed with FLASH 243172 B / 1 MiB and RAM 73092 B / 256 KiB.

Local hardware detection on 2026-06-30 found no flash/smoke-test target:
- /Volumes contains only Attic and Macintosh HD; no R1-Neo, UF2, Adafruit, or nRF mass-storage volume.
- diskutil list shows only internal APFS and external Attic APFS disks; no small removable UF2 disk.
- /dev serial devices are Bluetooth/debug/wlan plus /dev/cu.usbserial-A704ESXG, an FT232R USB UART.
- ioreg USB devices include hubs, storage, Lumina camera, Logitech IOUSBHostDevice entries, FT232R, microphone, Fitbit, Yubikey, audio devices; no Muzi, R1 Neo, Adafruit, Nordic/nRF CDC/DFU, or UF2 device.

Created blocker project-LICHEN-avrb: provide local Muzi R1 Neo hardware in bootloader or app serial mode, or provide remote console/flashing access. No firmware flashing, boot logs, BLE advertising, LoRa init, or smoke-test assertions were possible without the hardware.
